text:

Date: Wed, 19 Sep 2001 11:01:07 -0400 (EDT)
From: Joe Clarke <marcus@marcuscom.com>
To: OKAZAKI Tetsurou <okazaki@FreeBSD.org>
Subject: Re: ports/30601: OpenSLP

Here it is.

Joe

On Wed, 19 Sep 2001, OKAZAKI Tetsurou wrote:

> Hi,
>
> In the message <20010919014050.O80494-100000@shumai.marcuscom.com>
> Joe Clarke <marcus@marcuscom.com> wrote:
>
> > Hi, thanks for taking this PR up.  I have another patch I'd like to add to
> > it in order to get it working with my netatalk port.  Should I send that
> > directly to you, or add it to the PR audit trail?  Thanks.
>
> Please post it or URL I can get it from to the audit trail.
>
> --
> Tetsurou
>
